speaker: Narrator
text:
It was near the end of the semester. Blanche and Christina are meeting with their marine biology professor during office hours. 
	
	She had been curious about how they could improve the project considering one aspect that may affect their synergy, Blanche had been undecided until recently over the course of her education.
	
	Additionally, there were larger concerns on the apparent mental deterioration of Christina.

speaker: Narrator
text:
There stood two beaming students, Christina especially had changed into an audacious dress and makeup that reflected her confidence. 
	
	Blanche was intensely focused on her partner. The professor could tell that these two were barely holding it together in the room.

speaker: Narrator
text: You passed, in fact, you've received the 3rd highest score this semester!

speaker: Blanche
text: Fuck yeah!

speaker: Christina
text: Blanche, please!

speaker: Professor
text: I'm glad to see that whatever you two did over the break has brought the shine back into your face, Christina.

speaker: Professor
text: I was worried about you, that you'd never get out of that pandemic depression.

speaker: Christina
text: I had a lot of help.

speaker: Christina
text: Going out into the field with a partner, someone you can really trust.

speaker: Professor
text: Doing it the proper way for once.

speaker: Blanche
text: Very important, the fishing laws...

speaker: Professor
text: Yes.

speaker: Professor
text: My major criticism isn't necessarily the conclusions of your work.

speaker: Professor
text: From what you've presented, at least.

speaker: Professor
text: There simply isn't enough corroborating studies to make this, um, A grade material.

speaker: Professor
text: I hope that you continue these studies in your futures.

speaker: Professor
text: Perhaps together?

speaker: Blanche
text: Oh you noticed?

speaker: Christina
text: We'll have more help in the future.

speaker: Christina
text: Don't worry about it.

speaker: Professor
text: Good to hear.

speaker: Professor
text: Enjoy the rest of your Summer!

speaker: Narrator
text:
The two girls help each other up. Christina embraces Blanche, smothering her in her chest. A new, healthy, clean, Christina. A perfect one for her. 
	
	She returns the hug, knowing that their futures are settled. In Science and in love.
